content:
Just had the most amazing durian ice cream at Magsaysay Park! 🍦 The locals here are so warm and welcoming. If you haven't tried durian yet, this is the place to do it. The smell is worth the taste, I promise! 😂

Davao has stolen my heart completely. Already planning my next trip with my Kuyog guide Maria!

Cloud 9 did NOT disappoint! 🏄‍♂️ Caught some of the best waves of my life today. My guide Alyssa found us this secret spot away from the crowds — felt like we had our own private paradise.

Pro tip: Visit during September-November for the best swells!

Learning the ancient art of T'nalak weaving with the T'boli community today was life-changing 🧵✨ These patterns have been passed down for generations, each one telling a story from their dreams.

Datu Kamlon is an incredible guide — his knowledge of T'boli culture is extraordinary.

White water rafting level: EXTREME! 🌊 CDO's rapids are no joke — 14 rapids in 2 hours of pure adrenaline rush. Juan was an amazing guide, kept us safe while making it incredibly fun.

Definitely bringing the whole family next time (maybe the beginner course for mom 😅)

The color of this water is UNREAL 💙 Enchanted River truly lives up to its name. The water is so clear and blue, it looks like liquid crystal. We even got to watch the fish feeding at noon!

Mindanao has some of the most magical places I've ever seen.
